name: io.github.anish632/ground-truth
title: Ground Truth
description: First tool call for AI agents: call check_endpoint with url=https://example.com. No signup or API key for the first endpoint check.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Optional team-plan API key. Leave empty for the first check_endpoint call with url=https://example.com. Add only after the first call works and only for team-plan paid tools.
